item.name: Sunlit Prism
item.description:
This small freshwater fish is drawn to shallow, well-lit waters.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Each of its scales is embedded with a tiny crystal that reflects the light of the sun. When in danger, it uses the bright, dazzling glint to blind its predators.
